languages.text: "Если твой повелитель счел тебя достойным лишь капитанского звания, на то есть причины, и не тебе сомневаться в его решениях".
languages.translation_comment: играет DL_GaprakMask или есть бэкграунд нобля
играет DL_GaprakMask или есть бэкграунд нобля

languages.text: "If your lord has deemed you worthy only of a captain's rank, then it is with good reason. It is not for you to question his decisions."
languages.original_text: "Если твой повелитель счел тебя достойным лишь капитанского звания, на то есть причины, и не тебе сомневаться в его решениях".

traits.locale_text: "If your lord has deemed you worthy only of a captain's rank, then it is with good reason. It is not for you to question his decisions."
"If your lord has deemed you worthy only of a captain's rank, then it is with good reason. It is not for you to question his decisions."
"If your lord has deemed you worthy only of a captain's rank, then it is with good reason. It is not for you to question his decisions."

languages.text: «Si su señor solo le considera digno del rango de capitán, tendrá buenos motivos para ello. No le corresponde a usted cuestionarle».
languages.original_text: "If your lord has deemed you worthy only of a captain's rank, then it is with good reason. It is not for you to question his decisions."

traits.locale_text: «Si su señor solo le considera digno del rango de capitán, tendrá buenos motivos para ello. No le corresponde a usted cuestionarle».

languages.text: “如果你的主君认为你只配上尉军衔，那他自然有他的道理。轮不到你来质疑。”
languages.original_text: "If your lord has deemed you worthy only of a captain's rank, then it is with good reason. It is not for you to question his decisions."

traits.locale_text: “如果你的主君认为你只配上尉军衔，那他自然有他的道理。轮不到你来质疑。”

languages.text: « Si votre seigneur a jugé bon de vous cantonner au rôle de capitaine, il devait avoir ses raisons. Ce n'est pas à vous de remettre ses décisions en question. »
languages.original_text: "If your lord has deemed you worthy only of a captain's rank, then it is with good reason. It is not for you to question his decisions."

traits.locale_text: « Si votre seigneur a jugé bon de vous cantonner au rôle de capitaine, il devait avoir ses raisons. Ce n'est pas à vous de remettre ses décisions en question. »

languages.text: "Efendin seni sadece yüzbaşılığa layık gördüyse bunun iyi bir nedeni vardır. Onun kararlarını sorgulamak sana düşmez."
languages.original_text: "If your lord has deemed you worthy only of a captain's rank, then it is with good reason. It is not for you to question his decisions."

traits.locale_text: "Efendin seni sadece yüzbaşılığa layık gördüyse bunun iyi bir nedeni vardır. Onun kararlarını sorgulamak sana düşmez."

languages.text: "Wenn Euch Euer Lord nur für den Rang eines Captains als würdig betrachtet, dann aus gutem Grund. Es steht Euch nicht zu, seine Entscheidungen infrage zu stellen."
languages.original_text: "If your lord has deemed you worthy only of a captain's rank, then it is with good reason. It is not for you to question his decisions."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn Euch Euer Lord nur für den Rang eines Captains als würdig betrachtet, dann aus gutem Grund. Es steht Euch nicht zu, seine Entscheidungen infrage zu stellen."

languages.text: 「もし主があなたを大尉の階級に値すると判断したならば、それは正当な理由による。主の判断を疑うのはあなたに非がある」
languages.original_text: "If your lord has deemed you worthy only of a captain's rank, then it is with good reason. It is not for you to question his decisions."

traits.locale_text: 「もし主があなたを大尉の階級に値すると判断したならば、それは正当な理由による。主の判断を疑うのはあなたに非がある」
